features: USB C to Lightning Adapter 2Pack: This USB C lightning adapter is compatible with USB C to USB C cable and USB A to USB C cable. Pair it with compatible USB C to lighting adapter and USB C cable. The compact design of the USBC to lightning adapter makes it easy to carry in your pocket, handbag or laptop bag. The adapter can reduce the need to carry different cables, making your device neater.

USB C to Lightning Cable Adapter Support Charging and Data Transfer: USB C lightning adapter enables charging and 480 Mbps data transfer speed, making iPhone or iPad directly compatible with USB C to USB C cable and USB A to USB C cable. Note: Only supports charging and data transfer between phone and computer. Does not support headphones, OTG audio and video functions. Does not support Apple Pencil, mouse, keyboard, USB flash drive, card reader, printer, microphone, HDMI converter and camera.

USB-C to Lightning Adapter Universal Compatibility: USB C to iPhone adapter charges your iOS device via Type-C cable. USB Type C Lightning Adapter is compatible with iPhone 14, iPhone 14 Plus, iPhone 14 Pro, iPhone 14 Pro Max, iPhone 13, iPhone 13 Pro, iPhone 13 Pro Max, iPhone 13 Mini, iPhone 12, iPhone 12 Pro, iPhone 12 Pro Max, iPhone 12 mini, iPhone 11, iPhone 11 Pro, iPhone 11 Pro Max, iPhone XS Max/XS/XR/X/8 Plus/8/SE, iPad, AirPods Pro.

Excellent Durability USB C to Lightning Adaptor: Type C to lightning adapter is made of high-quality aluminum alloy shell to protect the core components from strong impact, and the interior is made of high-quality copper wire with overcharge protection, stable current protection, which can charge your iPhone/iPad device quickly and safely. USB C lightning adapter has been tested with a service life of 20,000 times and strong carrying capacity. The 2-pack fast charger plug is convenient to use at home, in the office or when traveling, meeting the needs of simultaneous charging.

What You Get: USB C to lightning adapter *2. We put quality and after sales service first, if there is any problem with the USB C female to lightning male adapter, our customer team will give you a satisfactory solution.
description: Product Description HOSOW The USB C to lightning adapter supports PD fast charging, allowing iPhone to charge faster (up to 36W). Supports data transmission and can be used for MacBook/iPad to connect iPhone 14 13 12 for data synchronization. iPhone, iPad, AirPods and other devices with Lightning interface can use USB C cables or chargers without purchasing additional Lightning cables. The USB C female to lightning male adapter supports up to 36W fast charging, allowing you to use existing USB C cables to power Lightning devices, such as for iPhone 14,13,12, iPad. These USB C to lightning cable adapter are made of high-quality aluminum alloy, which is not only durable but also lightweight, and the stylish design ensures excellent heat dissipation and long-lasting performance. The adapter is small and easy to carry, which can reduce the burden of cables when traveling. Whether you are reducing cable clutter at home or looking for versatile charging options when traveling, these USB C lightning adapter provide a fast plug-and-play solution. This USB-C to lightning adapter does not require the purchase of additional Lightning cables, and directly uses existing USB-C cables to reduce expenses. Avoid discarding old devices. Support Fast Charging & Data Transmission Type C to iPhone adapter The type C to lightning adapter supports PD fast charging (up to 65W+), allowing iPhone to charge faster, while supporting data synchronization, suitable for MacBook/iPad to connect to iPhone. Excellent Durability USB C Lightning Adapter The USB C to iPhone adapter is made of high-quality aluminum alloy shell, with high-quality chips inside, with overcharge protection, stable current protection, which can charge your iPhone /iPad device quickly and safely. Strong Compatibility USB C to Lightning Adapter 2Pack The MFi certified chip ensures that your device charges safely at the fastest speed, and the adapter makes Lightning devices (iPhone, iPad, AirPods) compatible with USB-C cables and chargers, without the need to purchase additional Lightning cables. USB C to Lightning Adapter Universally Compatible Devices: iPhone 14, iPhone 14 Plus, iPhone 14 Pro, iPhone 14 Pro Max iPhone 13, iPhone 13 Pro, iPhone 13 Pro Max, iPhone 13 Mini iPhone 12, iPhone 12 Pro, iPhone 12 Pro Max, iPhone 12 mini iPhone 11, iPhone 11 Pro, iPhone 11 Pro Max iPhone XS Max, XS, XR, X, 8 Plus, 8,iPhone SE iPhone 7 / 7 Plus / 6S / 6S Plus / 6 / 6 Plus / 5 / 5S / 5C iPad Pro 12.9 inch gen1 / iPad Pro 10.5 inch / iPad Pro 9.7 inch / iPad Air3 10.5 inch iPad mini5 7.9 inch /iPad (4th, 5th, 6th, 7th, 8th, 9th Generation) iPad mini5 7.9" (3th,4th, 5th Generation) iPad Air 10.9"Gen3/iPad pro Air Pods/AirPods Pro Note: Not for Flash Drive, Not for Audio, Apple Pencil, Not support OTG
